steps.t: The ruins of the Mâkhda Khorbo stand to the north-west of Umbar Baharbêl. Sigileth and Corudan asked to meet up with you there.
Corudan stands by the road east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
Sigileth stands by the road east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
Sigileth asked you to retrieve a number of curious objects near the Mâkhda Khorbo so she may examine them.
Sigileth is waiting for you to return to her east of the Mâkhda Khorbo with the strange objects for which she asked.
Corudan is beside the road east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
Corudan has asked you to speak with a distant onlooker down the hill to the east.
Sigileth is beside the road east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
Corudan stands by the road east of the Mâkhda Khorbo, north-west of Umbar Baharbêl.
